title: Harry Kingerski
compiled_truth: Harry Kingerski is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-06-21), Harry Kingerski sent 114 and received 2979 emails, totalling 3093 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (60), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (49), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (40), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (39), [D  Steffes](people/d-steffes) (31).
